mapper.select:
select ui.college , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.create_time , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , ui.phone_number , ro.repair_order_id , rse.status_name , ui.registration_date , ro.content , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ro.image_files_resource_key , ui.name , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1
,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name
FROM repair_order ro left join user_info ui on ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join repair_status_enum rse on ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 = rse.repair_status_enum_id left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.create_time , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , ui.phone_number , ro.repair_order_id , rse.status_name , ui.registration_date , ro.content , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ro.image_files_resource_key , ui.name , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1
,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name
FROM repair_order ro left join user_info ui on ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join repair_status_enum rse on ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 = rse.repair_status_enum_id left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 , ro.create_time , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , ui.phone_number , ro.repair_order_id , rse.status_name , ui.registration_date , ro.content , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ro.feedback , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ro.image_files_resource_key , ui.name , ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 , ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1
,image_files.resource_id as image_files_resource_id ,image_files.resource_name as image_files_resource_name ,image_files.resource_path as image_files_resource_path ,image_files.related_table_name as image_files_related_table_name ,image_files.related_table_key as image_files_related_table_key ,image_files.relate_table_column_name as image_files_relate_table_column_name
FROM repair_order ro left join user_info ui on ro.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on ro.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join repair_status_enum rse on ro.repair_status_enum_repair_status_enum_id_1 = rse.repair_status_enum_id left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='repair_order' and relate_table_column_name='image_files' ) as image_files on image_files.related_table_key=ro.repair_order_id
where ro.repair_order_id = #{id}
